page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re4.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 40 dedicated physical cores and 40 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio under KVM virtualization. The instance is configured with 480.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and application data. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from other tenants.

Given its high memory density relative to processing cores, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing tasks. The qualitative cost profile reflects a specialized hardware class optimized for high memory capacity per compute unit.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re4.10xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server utilizing the x86_64 architecture under KVM virtualization. It provides 40 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 40 physical cores, featuring a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 480.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. This hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated physical cores and high memory density for memory-bound enterprise workloads.
